commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 24:20 Why transgress you the commandments of the LORD, that you cannot prosper. because you have forsaken the LORD, he has also forsaken you. Priest, refers to Zacharias. Septuagint, "Azarias. "(Haydock) It is not certain whether this was the person whom Jesus Christ speaks, (Matthew xxiii. ; Calmet) as St. Jerome believes; (Matthew xxiii. ) or our Saviour alludes to one of the minor prophets, (Tirinus) or to the father of John the Baptist. (Baronius) (Haydock) Sight. Hebrew, "above "perhaps on the steps between the two courts. (Calmet) To make. Hebrew, "therefore hath he forsaken you.
